Man Mohan Singh oath taking
The lagna is that of moving sign the hora lagna is that of
the fixed sign so it will be medium years this means he
will rule a minimum of three year or two half years surely.
Mercury dasa is till 14 3 2006 – 1 12 2006. This is a
period where there will be tension with the opposition but
he will be in position to deal with it successfully. The
9th and 12th lord in seventh house. From chandra lagna 1st
and 4th lord in 11th house and from karkamsha lagna
{Pisces} 4th and 7th lord in 2nd house. Exchange of mars and
mercury makes it beneficial. There fore he will there
surely till the mercury dasa ends.
Many people predicted the fall of UPA that is not going to
happen.
Man Mohan Singh oath taking chart
Date: May 22, 2004
Time: 5:34:08 pm
Time Zone: 5:30:00 (East of GMT)
Place: 77 E 12' 00", 28 N 36' 00"
New Delhi, India
.
